label: Job giver AI sapper
description: Directs a sapper pawn to dig or destroy its way through walls and structures toward the colony. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

canMineNonMineables.label: Can mine non-mineables
canMineNonMineables.description: If true, the sapper digs through non-mineable structures (walls, doors) in addition to mineable rock.
